stemHtml: The reason why pre take-off holding areas are sometimes further from the active runway when ILS Category 2 and 3 landing procedures are in progress than during good weather operations is..

options.a: to increase aircraft separation in very reduced visibility conditions.
options.b: heavy precipitation may disturb guidance signals.
options.c: to increase distance from the runway during offset approach operations.
options.d: aircraft manoeuvring near the runway may disturb guidance signals.
